Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 691}I rented a car because I heard you could drive along the coast, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 691}You can't really see the ocean from the road... Well, it's fine, 'cause my girlfriend had fun anyway.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 691}...Hey, you. You aren't checking out my girlfriend, are you?[n]{f 1 1}
